concepts.jp_name: AEO共同インセンティブプログラム
concepts.definition: 2016年10月開始。約40省庁が参加し、認定優良企業（ACE）に49の便宜措置を提供。約3000社のACEが国の輸出入額の33.1%を占める。
concepts.context_quote: AEO Joint Incentive (AJI) programme was launched... companies which have been certified as 'Advanced Certified Enterprises' (ACE) will be entitled to enjoy as many as 49 facilitation measures

concepts.definition: 49便宜措置の6分類：(1)緑道（迅速許認可）、(2)少検査、(3)優先処理、(4)簡素化手続、(5)主要参照ベンチマーク、(6)パイロット改革参加権。
concepts.context_quote: 49 facilitation measures, which can be divided into six major categories: Green Lane, Less Inspection, Priority Treatment, Simplified Procedure, Major Reference Benchmark, Pilot Reform Project

concepts.jp_name: 国家信用情報共有プラットフォーム
concepts.definition: 国務院が設立。税関が1日平均約3000社のAEOデータをリアルタイムで送信。他省庁も情報を共有し、信用情報サイロを解消。
concepts.context_quote: China Customs exchanges and shares information on AEOs with other government departments by connecting its AEO management system to a national platform for credit information-sharing

concepts.definition: 全機関がAEOを動的に監督・監視。検査結果を共有し監督の重複を減少。違法・不誠実行為発見時は即座に税関に送信、AEO地位を停止・取消。
concepts.context_quote: All the authorities conduct dynamic supervision and monitoring on AEOs... If an enterprise is found to have engaged in illegal or dishonest activities... China Customs will suspend or revoke the AEO status

concepts.definition: 各省庁がプラットフォームで情報を共有・交換し、信用情報サイロを解消。監督をより知的・効率的に。
concepts.context_quote: contributes to the elimination of credit information silos, while making supervision more intelligent and efficient

concepts.jp_name: 国境機関間の相互認証
concepts.definition: 信用証明書の相互認証に基づき、国境機関間の相互信頼を反映。異なるプログラム・管理措置を調整し、通関を効率化。
concepts.context_quote: Based on the mutual recognition of different security and compliance programmes, such as mutual recognition of credit certificates, the AJI programme reflects mutual trust among border authorities

relationships.description: AJIプログラムが6カテゴリを含む
プラットフォームがサイロ解消を可能に
相互認証が6カテゴリを支援
